scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:mcp" "npm run dev:review" "npm run dev:council" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && poetry run uvicorn src.api.main:app --reload
scripts.dev:mcp: cd mcp_server && poetry run python src/server.py
scripts.dev:review: cd review_mcp_server && poetry run python src/server.py
scripts.dev:council: cd council_mcp_server && poetry run python src/server.py
